---
title: "Teacher Report"
---

Time on task and activity per student. The database decides which rows you see —
a teacher sees their enrolled students, a student sees only themselves.

```{=html}
<div id="report-header" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  <span id="report-status" style="color:var(--site-ink-2);font-size:.9rem;flex:1;">Loading…</span>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" onclick="loadReport()">Refresh</button>
</div>

<div id="report-wrap" style="display:none;overflow-x:auto;">
  <table id="report" class="table table-sm table-hover" style="font-size:.88rem;">
    <thead>
      <tr style="border-top:2px solid var(--parch-edge);">
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;">Student</th>
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;">Page</th>
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;text-align:right;">Active time</th>
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;text-align:right;">Visits</th>
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;text-align:right;">Plays</th>
        <th style="color:var(--parch-dim);font-weight:600;text-align:right;">Note clicks</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="report-body"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div id="report-empty" style="display:none;color:var(--site-ink-2);font-size:.9rem;padding:1.5rem 0;">
  No activity recorded yet.
</div>

<script>
function rFmt(sec) {
  const m = Math.floor(sec / 60), s = sec % 60;
  return m ? m + 'm ' + s + 's' : s + 's';
}
function rCell(map, name, page) {
  const k = name + '|' + page;
  if (!map[k]) map[k] = { name: name, page: page, sec: 0, visits: 0, plays: 0, notes: 0 };
  return map[k];
}

async function loadReport() {
  const status = document.getElementById('report-status');
  const wrap   = document.getElementById('report-wrap');
  const empty  = document.getElementById('report-empty');
  const tbody  = document.getElementById('report-body');

  let session = null;
  try { const r = await window.sb.auth.getSession(); session = r.data.session; } catch(e) {}

  if (!session) {
    status.textContent = 'Sign in to view the report.';
    wrap.style.display = 'none'; empty.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }

  status.textContent = 'Loading…';

  const res = await Promise.all([
    window.sb.from('page_sessions').select('student_name, page, active_seconds'),
    window.sb.from('activity_events').select('actor_name, app, event')
  ]);
  const time = res[0].data, e1 = res[0].error;
  const acts = res[1].data, e2 = res[1].error;

  if (e1 || e2) { status.textContent = (e1 || e2).message; wrap.style.display = 'none'; return; }

  const agg = {};
  for (const r of time || []) { const c = rCell(agg, r.student_name, r.page); c.sec += r.active_seconds || 0; c.visits += 1; }
  for (const r of acts || []) { const c = rCell(agg, r.actor_name, r.app); if (r.event === 'play') c.plays += 1; else if (r.event === 'note_click') c.notes += 1; }

  const rows = Object.values(agg).sort(function(a, b) { return a.name.localeCompare(b.name) || b.sec - a.sec; });

  tbody.innerHTML = '';
  rows.forEach(function(r) {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML =
      '<td>' + r.name + '</td>' +
      '<td style="color:var(--site-ink-2)">' + r.page + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">' + rFmt(r.sec) + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">' + r.visits + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">' + r.plays  + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums">' + r.notes  + '</td>';
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  });

  if (rows.length) {
    status.textContent = rows.length + ' row' + (rows.length !== 1 ? 's' : '');
    wrap.style.display = ''; empty.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    status.textContent = ''; wrap.style.display = 'none'; empty.style.display = '';
  }
}

setTimeout(loadReport, 300);
</script>
```
